title: bidens elevata
intro: Bidens elevata, also known as Bidens, is a flowering plant species in the aster family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens elevata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Bidens elevata can be prepared as a herbal infusion or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to treat wounds and skin irritations.
